compiled_state.title: RED: Add tests for read_first gate and test validation step in task-execution.md
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) after implementation task completes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test class exists asserting template contains mandatory file-list reading instruction (read_first gate)
  Verify: grep -q "read_first\|file.impact\|file.*list.*read\|mandatory.*read" tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
- [ ] Test asserts template contains suffix-matched exemplar discovery for create-action files
  Verify: grep -q "exemplar\|suffix.*match\|sibling" tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
- [ ] Test asserts template handles PascalCase, snake_case, and kebab-case naming conventions
  Verify: grep -q "PascalCase\|snake_case\|kebab" tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
- [ ] Test asserts Step 4 instructs agents to validate existing RED tests (not write new tests)
  Verify: grep -q "validat.*test\|existing.*test\|RED.*test" tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
- [ ] Test asserts CHECKPOINT 2/6 records files and exemplars read
  Verify: grep -q "CHECKPOINT 2/6.*files\|exemplar.*read\|files.*read" tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py
- [ ] All new tests FAIL (RED) against the current unmodified task-execution.md
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py -k "read_first or exemplar or test_validation" --tb=short -q 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|failed"

## TDD Requirement
Write failing tests that assert the new template content. Tests must fail against the current template (RED) and pass after the implementation task modifies the template (GREEN).

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py (modify)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py, .test-index. Tests: 11 RED (expected). Review: passed (5/5).
comments.author: Main

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests for read_first gate and test validation in task-execution.md
